DP.418.0000:
Dawn: Hi, [0103,0000]!
How’s your Pokédex coming along?\f
Me? I’m somewhere between fantastic
and, uh, hopeless...\f
But this isn’t about me!
I’ve got something nice for you.\f
[0103,0000], choose which hand
you want.
DP.418.0001:
Dawn: I see...
You want the Vs. Seeker.\f
I’m impressed, [0103,0000].
You know what’s important.\f
DP.418.0002:
Dawn: Using that Vs. Seeker, you can
find Trainers who want a rematch\r
with you.\f
Oh, [0103,0000], do you also have
a Pokétch?\f
Yup, you do.
You can have this too, then.\f
You deserve it for all your hard
work, [0103,0000].\f
DP.418.0003:
Dawn: The [0118,0001] is
something you should touch often.\f
It will tell you if there is an item
on the ground that you can’t see.\f
It will be especially useful inside
dark caves.\f
OK, let’s keep working on our
Pokédexes.\f
Professor Rowan is counting on us!\f
DP.418.0004:
Lucas: Hey, [0103,0000]!
How’s your Pokédex coming along?\f
Me? I’m always doing great!
...I wish...\f
But that’s not important.\f
Lately, I’ve been experimenting with
a couple of neat tools.\f
[0103,0000], I’ll share with you.
Choose a hand!
DP.418.0005:
Lucas: Oh yeah.
You want the Vs. Seeker.\f
Yup, [0103,0000], you know what’s
important.\f
DP.418.0006:
Lucas: Using that Vs. Seeker, you can
find Trainers who want to battle with\r
you again.\f
[0103,0000], what about a Pokétch?
Do you have one?\f
Yup, you do.
You can have this too, then.\f
You deserve it for all of your
effort, [0103,0000].\f
DP.418.0007:
Lucas: The [0118,0001] is...
Just try touching it.\f
It’ll alert you if there is an
unseeable item on the ground.\f
It’s especially handy for finding
things in dark caves.\f
OK, keep working on your Pokédex.
Professor Rowan is counting on us!\f
DP.418.0009:
That slope’s too slippery.
You’ll need a Bike to get up.\f
You don’t have a Bicycle?
There’s a Cycle Shop in Eterna City.
DP.418.0010:
If you change gears on your Bicycle,
you can shoot right up that slope.
DP.418.0013:
Trainer Tips\f
Pokémon may become immobilized if
they are asleep or paralyzed.\f
If it happens to your Pokémon,
it could be disastrous.\f
If your opponent’s Pokémon can’t
move, it’s a big opportunity!
